ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Timestamp for the data point */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price for the instrument */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price for the instrument */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price for the instrument */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price for the instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume for the instrument */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., stock, option, future) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the instrument (e.g., technology, finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the instrument (e.g., software, banking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_instrument_type FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_type") REFERENCES instrument_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_dicts" (
  "dict_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data dictionary entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "field_description" TEXT /* Description of the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_dicts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the instrument */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user managing the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_instruments" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument held in the portfolio */,
  "allocation" REAL /* Allocation of the instrument in the portfolio (as a percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
